title: $WEBGEN_X_ID_INSNAME
text: $WEBGEN_X_ID_INSNAME Determines whether webgen appends the instance name of the static server page to the id attribute that it generates for the x-id placeholder attribute. $WEBGEN_X_ID_INSNAME { = } 1 | 0 Defaults Assignment file: Any application assignment file Section: [WEB] Default value: 0 Alias: [SETTINGS] \ $WEBGEN_X_ID_INSNAME (Deprecated) Description By default, webgen does not generate id attributes for the XHTML controls that represent Uniface fields in static server pages. It is possible to change this behavior globally by setting $WEBGEN_X_ID_DEFAULT to true , or locally by adding x-id="1" to the <x-subst type=" FieldType "> . This causes webgen to generate an id attribute that has the same value as the name attribute. You can append the instance name of the USP to the id by setting $WEBGEN_X_ID_INSNAME = 1 . The resulting id would have the format: id=" { E SequenceNumber . } FieldName . EntityName . ModelName { . OccurrenceNumber }{ . InstanceName } " This is also the format used for value of the for attribute, if x-for="1" . For more information, see the "x-id" topic. $WEBGEN_X_ID_INSNAME is ignored if webgen does not generate id attributes in this fashion. Related Links $WEBGEN_X_ID_DEFAULT Determines the default value of the x-id placeholder attribute for fields in static server pages. $WEBGEN_X_FOR_DEFAULT Determines the default value of the x-for placeholder attribute for associated labels in static server pages. <x-subst type="WidgetType"> XHTML placeholder for the USP widget and field data that will be generated in the HTML sent to the browser.
